name: chr3p_subtelomeric_variable
description: Chromosome 3 p-arm subtelomeric region containing a mosaic of subterminal repeats shared with other subtelomeres, degenerate TTAGGG stretches and small SDs. Variable per individual; site of 3p- (3p deletion) syndrome breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: Subterminal mosaic shared across multiple chromosome ends; TAR1-family subterminal repeats; degenerate telomere repeats; canonical TTAGGG distal tip.
